headline: Does Cardinal Health's (CAH) Higher Dividend and Guidance Hint at a New Capital Allocation Play?
summary: Earlier this month, Cardinal Health, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.5158 per share, payable on July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 1, 2026. This dividend move comes alongside upgraded fiscal 2026 earnings guidance and strong momentum in the Pharmaceutical & Specialty Solutions segment, especially specialty therapies. We’ll now examine how Cardinal Health’s raised fiscal 2026 earnings guidance may affect its investment narrative and longer-term business...
